fw_gear_file_curator.parser module

fw_gear_file_curator.parser.parse_config(context: GearToolkitContext) → Tuple[str, Dict[str, Any], Dict[str, str | None]][source]

Parse gear config.

Parameters:

context (GearToolkitContext)

Returns:

tuple containing:

  • (str) path to curator

  • (Dict[str,Any]) input file

  • (Dict[str,Optional[str]]) Dictionary of optional additional inputs

Return type:

Tuple[str, str, Dict[str, Optional[str]], Optional[str]]
